content: xx29BBA8: Fuck me, doc, this piss-stained market smells worse than a raider’s arsehole after a chem binge. Ain’t seen you since you patched me up after that fuck-fight with the Vagabonds. How’s business? Still stitching up whores and raiders alike? Dr Alan Webb: Business is booming, love. Just sewed up a Tommy’s balls after some Syndicate slag took a knife to ‘em. Fucking animals, the lot of ‘em. You look like you could use another round of Med-X—or maybe something harder. Got Jet if you’re feeling frisky. xx29BBA8: Might take you up on that Jet if the price ain’t too steep. Heard the Genty’s been rounding up clones from Angel’s labs—turning ‘em into their personal fuck-toys. Saw one last night tied up outside Westminster, begging for it while the toffs laughed. Disgusting fucks. Dr Alan Webb: Disgusting’s the word, sweetheart. But don’t act like you ain’t had a taste of forbidden fruit yourself.

xx29BBA8: Fucking hell, doc. Talking 'bout this shit just makes me want another drink—or maybe something stronger to burn it all away. Dr Alan Webb: Come find me later if the shakes get bad. I’ll hook you up proper—just don’t bleed on my fucking floor this time.
